name: Funko Pop Figure Creation
body:
---
title: Funko Pop Figure Creation

Transform the person in the photo into the style of a Funko Pop figure box, presented in isometric view.
The packaging is labeled with the title “JAMES BOND.”
Inside the box, display a chibi-style figure based on the person in the photo, along with their essential accessories: a pistol, a wristwatch, a suit, and other signature items.
Next to the box, show a realistic rendering of the actual figure outside the packaging, with detailed textures and lighting to achieve a lifelike product display.

## Reference Image
A clear half-body or full-body photo.

## Source
- [Original Post](https://x.com/dotey/status/1909047283485671924)

## Example Output
![Funko Pop Figure Creation](/media/3d/funko-pop-figure-creation.webp)
description_en: Image-generation prompt that turns an uploaded photo into a Funko Pop-style boxed figure shown in isometric view alongside a realistic out-of-box rendering.
description_zh: 图像生成提示词，把上传照片做成等距视角的 Funko Pop 盒装手办，并在旁边附上写实开盒成品渲染。
long_en: Builds a boxed chibi figure labeled with a title and signature accessories, plus a lifelike product shot of the figure outside the box, using a half- or full-body reference photo. Needs an image model that accepts a reference image.
long_zh: 依据半身或全身参考照片，生成带标题与标志性配件的盒装 Q 版手办，并附一张逼真的开盒成品照。需要支持参考图的图像模型。
sec_note_en: Requires an image-generation model and an uploaded personal photo that is sent to a third-party service.
sec_note_zh: 需要图像生成模型，并将上传的个人照片发送给第三方服务。
